.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(68, 71, 90) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 4.75px / 15.675px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 4.75px / 15.675px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(29, 28, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #44475a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#44475a, color-mix(in srgb, #44475a 65%, transparent))
body.--font-monospace:
'??', "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Menlo, SFMono-Regular,
    Consolas, "Roboto Mono", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body.--font-monospace-theme:
"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Menlo, SFMono-Regular,
    Consolas, "Roboto Mono", monospace
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #44475a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#44475a, color-mix(in srgb, #44475a 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(29, 28, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
code.font-family: "??", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Menlo, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Roboto Mono", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.075) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.075) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(43, 39, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(43, 39, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(189, 147, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(29, 28, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "??", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Menlo, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Roboto Mono", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

mark.background: rgba(255, 85, 85, 0.808) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(29, 28, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(29, 28, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Menlo, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Roboto Mono", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

th.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(2, 5, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
